episodes.title: Britain’s Starmer: ‘I Take Responsibility’ for Appointing Mandelson | WSJ News
episodes.description:
British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he unintentionally misled lawmakers by claiming that Peter Mandelson, the ambassador to Washington, had full security clearance. Mandelson, who was a close friend of Epstein’s, was removed from the job.

#WSJ #UK #epsteinfiles

episodes.title: Ghislaine Maxwell Declines to Answer Questions From Congress | WSJ News
episodes.description:
Ghislaine Maxwell, the longtime associate of Jeffrey Epstein, was subpoenaed to testify before the House Oversight Committee but declined to answer questions, which members of Congress called ‘very disappointing.’ Photo: Department of Justice; J. Scott Applewhite/AP

#WSJ #EpsteinFiles #ghislainemaxwell
